sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39449" key="e)piqhmato/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιθημᾰτ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n39449.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put a lid upon</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τι</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1140.tlg001:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anticl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
